notes: Behavior contract for 手作·印记. Logic-first; UI is compile-anchor until design artifacts (page-*.html, design-alignment.md) arrive. Persistence is local-first via preferences; in-memory fallback when prefs unavailable.

fields.name: string (required)
fields.points: number (balance, derived mirror of last tx balanceAfter)
fields.totalSpend: number (sum of earn-from-spend tx amounts/pointsPerYuan cost)

derived.isSleeping: now - lastVisitAt > settings.sleepingThresholdDays (and has a lastVisitAt)

formState.memberForm: name, phone, nickname, birthday, crafts[], notes, allergy, workImages[], editingId?
formState.inventoryForm: name, spec, unit, stock, safeStock, notes, editingId?

dataModel.persistence: preferences-backed under AppStorage keys: members, courses, bookings, pointTx, materials, invTx, settings. Persisted best-effort on every mutation; in-memory when prefs unavailable. AppStorage is the reactive layer pages observe via @StorageLink.

services.name: AppStore
services.role: Singleton over AppStorage: CRUD + derived queries for all entities; mutates AppStorage keys (reassigns arrays for reactivity); triggers persistence.

services.name: PointService
services.role: applyPointTx(memberId, type, signedAmount, reason, ref) -> updates member.points mirror + appends PointTransaction with balanceAfter; enforces spend <= balance.

services.name: InventoryService
services.role: applyTx(materialId, type, signedQty, reason, ref) -> updates material.stock + appends InventoryTransaction with balanceAfter.

services.name: BookingService
services.role: createBooking(courseId, memberId, remark, usePoints): validates capacity + stock, appends Booking, increments bookedCount via active bookings count, deducts course materials via InventoryService, awards points (price * pointsPerYuan, minus points-used if usePoints) via PointService, updates member.lastVisitAt. cancelBooking(bookingId): sets cancelled, restores stock, releases capacity, no point reversal (documented).

services.name: ReminderService
services.role: sleepingMembers(thresholdDays), lowStockMaterials(); formatReminderSummary for home banner.

services.name: PersistenceService
services.role: load(): read preferences JSON into AppStorage on app start; save(): serialize AppStorage to preferences best-effort. Initialized with UIAbilityContext in EntryAbility.

bookingValidation.errDup: member already has active booking for course

checkinState.available: no checkin tx for member today
checkinState.done: checkin tx exists today -> button disabled with feedback

steps: save-member validates: name non-empty, phone non-empty, phone unique
remove Member; cascade: cancel active bookings, keep tx history but mark? (MVP: remove member tx from points list view filter, keep data)
interactionFlows.decision: MVP keeps transaction history data but member removed from members list; detail no longer reachable.

steps: check if a checkin tx exists for member today
if done -> no-op + feedback '今日已签到'
validate spend/adjust does not exceed balance (spend)
if type relates to spend and reason indicates consume, optionally bump totalSpend (MVP: only course bookings bump spend)
validate each course material has stock >= quantity
points: earn = price*pointsPerYuan; if usePoints and member.points>0, spend min(member.points, earn) -> net earn; applyPointTx earn/spend accordingly

interactionFlows.notes: No point reversal in MVP (documented in handoff).

steps: navigate members tab with sleeping filter active
member-detail wake action records lastVisitAt touch + note (MVP: marks as contacted by setting a contactedAt note)
interactionFlows.notes: Local notification is best-effort via ReminderService; MVP records wake action.

steps: navigate inventory tab filtered to low stock

errors: out exceeds stock -> clamp at 0 + warn (MVP)

steps: switch local view mode between month calendar and list

changeRequests: Spec lists 5 tabs; scaffold template ships 4 (home/explore/orders/rewards). Shell remapped to: home/members/courses/points/inventory. All template placeholder pages removed.
Theme is template green/gold; product requires terracotta + handwritten warmth. Theme tokens retuned to clay palette; handwritten typography polish deferred to visual integration (design lane).
Rawfile SVG icon assets not yet generated by design lane; BottomTabBar keeps SvgIcon wrapper contract (renders blank until assets arrive). No emoji/unicode icons used.

course-edit page is referenced by navigate-course-edit event but has no dedicated surface in ui-tree; MVP creates courses via a lightweight inline dialog/form on the courses page (recorded here, not in ui-tree).
